muxt generate -v --use-templates-variable=pagesTemplates --use-templates-variable=sharedTemplates
stdout 'generating handler for pattern GET /'
stdout 'generating handler for pattern GET /hidden'

-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22
-- template.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed all:templates/pages
var pagesFS embed.FS

var pagesTemplates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(pagesFS, "templates/pages/*.gohtml"))

// sharedFS embeds the same tree without the all: prefix, so the
// underscore-prefixed file embedded by pagesFS must not be matched here.
//
//go:embed templates
var sharedFS embed.FS

var sharedTemplates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(sharedFS, "templates/shared/*.gohtml", "templates/pages/_*.gohtml"))
-- templates/pages/index.gohtml --
{{define "GET /" }}
	<h1>Hello, world!</h1>
{{end}}
-- templates/pages/_hidden.gohtml --
{{define "GET /hidden" }}
	<h1>Hello, from a file the all: prefix embedded!</h1>
{{end}}
-- templates/shared/footer.gohtml --
{{define "footer"}}
	<footer>shared footer</footer>
{{end}}
